resultList.dtldesc: A stunning 4 BHK villa is now available for sale in Gem Estrella Kuber, Kollur, Hyderabad, offering an unparalleled blend of space, luxury, and tranquility. Designed for those who appreciate sophistication and comfort, this exquisite home presents a rare chance to own a prestigious property in a peaceful, well-connected neighborhood.::::::Property Specifications::::::Tucked away in the serene surroundings of Gem Estrella Kuber, this meticulously crafted 4 BHK villa redefines luxury living. Spanning an impressive 3,580 sqft across three levels, the vastu-compliant residence is oriented towards the North-West, ensuring excellent ventilation and natural light throughout.::::::Unfurnished to allow for customization, the villa boasts a thoughtfully designed layout. The ground floor features a welcoming visitor’s room, a spacious bedroom, two western-style bathrooms (one en-suite and one powder room), a generous living area, a well-integrated kitchen and dining space, and a dedicated servant’s washroom.::::::The first floor offers a cozy family lounge, two elegantly designed bedrooms with attached bathrooms, and a common balcony that invites fresh air and scenic views. The second floor is the perfect retreat, featuring a dedicated home theatre with an attached washroom, alongside an expansive terrace ideal for leisure and entertainment. A utility area adds to the home’s functionality, while vitrified flooring throughout enhances its modern aesthetic.::::::Facilities::::::Set within a secure gated community, this villa ensures a premium living experience with top-tier amenities. Residents benefit from two covered parking spaces, a round-the-clock water supply, full power backup, and 24/7 security with CCTV surveillance, providing peace of mind and convenience.::::::Locality::::::Strategically positioned at the entrance of Kollur Village, right next to the ORR Service Road, this home offers excellent connectivity to key destinations. Renowned educational institutions such as Samasti, Gaudium, DPS, and Birla Open Minds are just 500 meters away, while reputed hospitals, shopping malls, and supermarkets are within easy reach. ::::::Public transportation, including buses and autos, is readily available, and the railway station is a mere 2 km away. With seamless access to major roads, this villa ensures a lifestyle of unmatched comfort and connectivity.::

resultList.dtldesc: This well designed two BHK apartment with a super built up area of one thousand two hundred and ninetyeight sq. ft is located in the well developed Alkapur Township Hyderabad. Situated on the third floor of a multi storey residential complex the flat is ideal for families seeking a comfortable home with modern amenities and excellent connectivity along a main road location.::::::::Property Specifications ::::::::The apartment is positioned on the third floor and features two bedrooms that are semi furnished. Furnishings include beds and air conditioners in the bedrooms while the living room is unfurnished. The flat offers two bathrooms one attached to a bedroom and one common both finished in full tile work and designed in western style. Geysers and shower fixtures are installed in the bathrooms. Flooring across the apartment including the master bedroom is finished with vitrified tiles. The kitchen is a proper modular kitchen equipped with cabinets while piped gas connection is not available. The flat includes balconies overlooking the garden along with a separate wash area. The main entrance is west facing and the flat is Vaastu compliant. Electrical fittings such as lights and fans are installed throughout the apartment. The property enjoys one hundred percent power backup.Facilities The apartment comes with one covered parking space. The society offers well built security arrangements along with CCTV surveillance. Residents have access to a range of amenities including a swimming pool clubhouse badminton court and basketball court ensuring a well balanced lifestyle within the complex.::::Locality ::::Located in Alkapur Township the property is adjacent to Gandhi Park and is close to reputed educational institutions such as Elate School Gowtham School and DPS. The area enjoys excellent public transport connectivity with easy availability of buses and taxis due to its main road location making daily commuting convenient.
